since_last: 32% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.12%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 32% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.26% · BTC -2.15% · Gold -2.28% · Nasdaq100 -1.82%. 32% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.12%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.12%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -3.31%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TSLA is the standout at -13.96%
cards.body: Leaders: HON +5.12%, SMCI +4.96%, AVAV +4.80%, SKHY +4.63%, CBRS +4.17%. Laggards: TSLA -13.96%, CRNC -9.10%, GOOGL -6.76%, SYM -4.73%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.20% at $115.49
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.20% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
